title: Sleep Control
description: Adds one‑player sleep and a /sleep skip command. Instantly skip the night or enable single‑player sleep on servers.
body:
SleepControl – One Player Sleep & Night Skip
SleepControl adds simple, server‑friendly sleep management to Minecraft.
Enable one‑player sleep so any player can skip the night, or use /sleep skip to instantly set the world to daytime.
Features
- One‑Player Sleep — When enabled, the first player who sleeps instantly skips the night.
- /sleep one — Turns on one‑player sleep mode (OP only)(lets one player sleeping skip the night).
- /sleep skip — Instantly skips the night and clears weather (OP only)(not the same as always    day).
- Lightweight — No mixins, no configs, no lag.
- Server‑friendly — Works on Fabric servers and singleplayer worlds.
